samples.st: MOTOR := ((START AND NOT STOP) OR MOTOR) AND NOT ((STOP));

MOTOR_FWD := ((FWD_PB AND NOT REV_PB AND NOT STOP) OR MOTOR_FWD) AND NOT ((STOP OR REV_PB)) AND NOT MOTOR_REV;
MOTOR_REV := ((REV_PB AND NOT FWD_PB AND NOT STOP) OR MOTOR_REV) AND NOT ((STOP OR FWD_PB)) AND NOT MOTOR_FWD;
PUMP := ((LO_LS AND NOT HI_LS) OR PUMP) AND NOT ((HI_LS));
VALVE := ((MODE_AUTO AND AUTO_CMD) OR (NOT MODE_AUTO AND MAN_CMD)) AND NOT SYS_STOP;

MOTOR_RUN := ((START_PB AND NOT JOG_PB AND NOT STOP_PB) OR MOTOR_RUN) AND NOT ((STOP_PB)) AND NOT MOTOR_JOG;
MOTOR_JOG := ((JOG_PB AND NOT START_PB) OR MOTOR_JOG) AND NOT ((NOT JOG_PB)) AND NOT MOTOR_RUN;
ALARM := ((FAULT_A OR FAULT_B OR FAULT_C) OR ALARM) AND NOT ((ALARM_RST AND NOT FAULT_A AND NOT FAULT_B AND NOT FAULT_C));

PUMP_LEAD := ((DEMAND AND NOT SYS_STOP) OR (NOT HIGH_DEMAND) OR PUMP_LEAD) AND NOT ((SYS_STOP) OR (HIGH_DEMAND AND NOT SYS_STOP));
PUMP_LAG := ((HIGH_DEMAND AND NOT SYS_STOP) OR PUMP_LAG) AND NOT ((NOT HIGH_DEMAND));
PRESS_ENABLE := ((LH_BTN AND RH_BTN AND GUARD_CLOSED AND ESTOP_OK) OR PRESS_ENABLE) AND NOT ((NOT LH_BTN OR NOT RH_BTN OR NOT GUARD_CLOSED OR NOT ESTOP_OK));
